mapper.select:
SELECT m.monitor_id, m.device_id, m.voltage, m.current_a, m.soc, m.power_output, m.solar_generation_kwh, m.charged_energy_kwh, m.used_energy_kwh, m.saved_cost, m.record_time, d.device_name, d.location, d.status AS device_status, g.group_name
FROM monitoring m
JOIN ess_device d ON m.device_id = d.device_id
LEFT JOIN ess_device_group g ON d.group_id = g.group_id
WHERE m.device_id = #{deviceId} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
ORDER BY m.record_time DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT m.monitor_id, m.device_id, m.voltage, m.current_a, m.soc, m.power_output, m.solar_generation_kwh, m.charged_energy_kwh, m.used_energy_kwh, m.saved_cost, m.record_time, d.device_name, d.location, d.status AS device_status, g.group_name
FROM monitoring m
JOIN ess_device d ON m.device_id = d.device_id
LEFT JOIN ess_device_group g ON d.group_id = g.group_id
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
ORDER BY m.record_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitoring ( device_id, voltage, current_a, soc, power_output, solar_generation_kwh, charged_energy_kwh, used_energy_kwh, saved_cost, record_time ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{voltage}, #{currentA}, #{soc}, #{powerOutput}, #{solarGenerationKwh}, #{chargedEnergyKwh}, #{usedEnergyKwh}, #{savedCost}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM monitoring m
JOIN ess_device d ON m.device_id = d.device_id
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'

SELECT group_id, group_name, description, created_at
FROM ess_device_group
WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
ORDER BY group_id ASC

SELECT device_id, member_id, group_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date, is_main, ess_capacity_kwh, current_charge_kwh, charge_efficiency, discharge_efficiency, electricity_rate
FROM ess_device
WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND IFNULL(deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
AND group_id = #{groupId}
ORDER BY device_id ASC

SELECT d.status AS deviceStatus,
latest.soc AS soc, latest.power_output AS powerOutput, latest.voltage AS voltage, latest.current_a AS currentA, latest.record_time AS recordTime,
IFNULL(el.daily_kwh, 0) AS dailyKwh, IFNULL(el.cost, 0) AS savedCost,
IFNULL(avg7.generationSevenDayAvg, 0) AS generationSevenDayAvg, IFNULL(avg7.costSevenDayAvg, 0) AS costSevenDayAvg
FROM ess_device d
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT m1.device_id, m1.soc, m1.power_output, m1.voltage, m1.current_a, m1.record_time FROM monitoring m1 JOIN ( SELECT device_id, MAX(record_time) AS max_record_time FROM monitoring WHERE DATE(record_time) = #{selectedDate} GROUP BY device_id ) m2 ON m1.device_id = m2.device_id AND m1.record_time = m2.max_record_time ) latest ON d.device_id = latest.device_id
LEFT JOIN energy_log el ON d.device_id = el.device_id AND el.log_date = #{selectedDate}
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT device_id, AVG(daily_kwh) AS generationSevenDayAvg, AVG(cost) AS costSevenDayAvg FROM energy_log WHERE log_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{selectedDate}, INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND #{selectedDate} GROUP BY device_id ) avg7 ON d.device_id = avg7.device_id
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND d.device_id = #{deviceId} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'

SELECT m.monitor_id AS monitorId, m.device_id AS deviceId, m.voltage AS voltage, m.current_a AS currentA, m.soc AS soc, m.power_output AS powerOutput, m.solar_generation_kwh AS solarGenerationKwh, m.charged_energy_kwh AS chargedEnergyKwh, m.used_energy_kwh AS usedEnergyKwh, m.saved_cost AS savedCost, m.record_time AS recordTime
FROM monitoring m
JOIN ess_device d ON m.device_id = d.device_id
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND m.device_id = #{deviceId} AND DATE(m.record_time) = #{selectedDate} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
ORDER BY m.record_time ASC

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(solar_generation_kwh), 0)
FROM monitoring
WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND DATE(record_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(el.log_date, '%m-%d') AS label, IFNULL(el.daily_kwh, 0) AS dailyKwh, IFNULL(el.daily_kwh, 0) AS value, IFNULL(el.cost, 0) AS cost, IFNULL(el.cost, 0) AS savedCost
FROM energy_log el
JOIN ess_device d ON el.device_id = d.device_id
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND el.device_id = #{deviceId} AND el.log_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{selectedDate}, INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND #{selectedDate} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
ORDER BY el.log_date ASC

SELECT a.alert_id, a.device_id, a.alert_type, a.alert_level, a.message, a.status, a.control_action, a.created_at
FROM ess_alert a
WHERE a.device_id = #{deviceId}
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT d.status AS deviceStatus,
NULL AS soc, NULL AS powerOutput, NULL AS voltage, NULL AS currentA, NULL AS recordTime,
IFNULL(el.daily_kwh, 0) AS dailyKwh, IFNULL(el.cost, 0) AS savedCost,
IFNULL(avg7.generationSevenDayAvg, 0) AS generationSevenDayAvg, IFNULL(avg7.costSevenDayAvg, 0) AS costSevenDayAvg
FROM ess_device d
LEFT JOIN energy_log el ON d.device_id = el.device_id AND el.log_date = #{selectedDate}
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT device_id, AVG(daily_kwh) AS generationSevenDayAvg, AVG(cost) AS costSevenDayAvg FROM energy_log WHERE log_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{selectedDate}, INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND #{selectedDate} GROUP BY device_id ) avg7 ON d.device_id = avg7.device_id
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND d.device_id = #{deviceId} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(el.log_date, '%m-%d') AS label,
IFNULL(el.daily_kwh, 0) AS dailyKwh,
IFNULL(el.daily_kwh, 0) AS value,
IFNULL(el.cost, 0) AS savedCost
FROM energy_log el
JOIN ess_device d ON el.device_id = d.device_id
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND el.device_id = #{deviceId} AND el.log_date = #{selectedDate} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
